title: Bulk student import (CSV)
oneLiner: Voice-guided tour for use case: Bulk student import (CSV)

steps.label: Landing page ready
steps.observe: Home page is open. Auto voice tour begins — no blue-tag clicks needed.

steps.label: Open Students list
steps.observe: Bulk upload control on Students screen.

steps.label: Upload student CSV — manual
steps.observe: student_welcome emails sent; college_student_bulk_import summary to admin.

steps.label: New student signs in — manual
steps.observe: Use temp password from welcome mail; complete profile.

steps.label: College verifies student — manual
steps.observe: Verify student on Students list unlocks placement features.
